title: DOV vs. IEX: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Manufacturing - General Industrial sector might want to consider either Dover Corporation (DOV) or Idex (IEX). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: Dover's (DOV) Hydro Releases Eco-Friendly AccuMini Dispenser
text: Hydro, a JV of Dover (DOV) and PSG, introduces the AccuMini dispenser.

title: Hydro Introduces New AccuMini Dispenser
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , June 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Hydro, part of PSG and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the release of its new AccuMini™ dispenser.

title: CDS Visual Completes SOC 2 Type II Certification
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , June 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CDS Visual, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading provider of software as a service (SaaS) 3D visualization solutions, today announced that it has successfully completed its Service Organization Control (SOC) 2® Type II certification.

title: Markem-Imaje Launches New Thermal Transfer Ribbon to Meet Growing Demand for Paper-Based Flexible Film Package Printing
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , June 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Markem-Imaje, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a global provider of end-to-end supply chain solutions and industrial marking and coding systems, today announced the launch of the SmartDate® Xtra 3530.

title: Why Dover Corporation (DOV) is a Top Momentum Stock for the Long-Term
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: 4 Industrial Stocks That Are Screaming Buys in June
text: Many industrial companies are trading at low valuations relative to their expected growth. Some blue-chip industrials can be great additions to your long-term portfolio.

title: OPW Vehicle Wash Solutions Unveils Four New Products
text: New solutions include innovations for both in-bay automatic and tunnel vehicle washes DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , June 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- OPW Vehicle Wash Solutions, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), announced the launch of four new products to help vehicle wash operators market their sites and provide customers enhanced wash experiences.
